properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, Your mercy is all my plea I have no defense, my guilt runs too deep The best of my works pierced Your hands and Your feet Jesus, Your mercy is all my plea

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, Your mercy is all my boast The goodness I claim, the grounds of my hope Whatever I lack, it's still what I need most Jesus, Your mercy is all my boast

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Praise the King who bore my sin Took my place when I stood condemned, Oh, how good You've always been to me, I will sing of Your mercy.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus, Your mercy is all my rest When fears weight me down and enemies press, A comfort I cling to in life and in death, Jesus, Your mercy is all my rest.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus, Your mercy is all my joy Forever I'll lift my heart and my voice, To sing of a treasure, no pow'r can destroy, Jesus, Your mercy is all my joy.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Praise the King who bore my sin Took my place when I stood condemned, Oh, how good You've always been to me.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I will sing, Praise the King who bore my sin Took my place when I stood condemned Oh, how good You've always been to me I will sing of Your mercy, Oh, I will sing.
